title: 6 New Unspoken Rules for Using Lightning Lanes in Magic Kingdom
description: If you've done your research, you already know the basics: what Lightning Lane Multi Pass is, how the tiers work, and that you can book up to three selections ahead of your visit. But there's a layer of strategy underneath all of that which can completely change how your day plays out. We're breaking down six things that don't get talked about nearly enough, and honestly, knowing even one of these could save your whole trip.
